---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new tool, domain, or improvement
title: '[feature] '
labels: enhancement
---

**What do you want to do?**
e.g. "Add support for the Avito Jobs API" / "Improve the description of items_post_item_analytics".

**Link to the Avito OpenAPI spec** (if requesting a new domain)
https://developers.avito.ru/api-catalog/...

**Why is it useful for AI agents?**
What user scenario does this unlock? Which prompts will start working?

**Additional context**
Anything else.
